sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this racing game

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Physics - Racing Game
special_mechanics.description: F1 World Championship Edition is a racing game featuring Formula One car physics, not character movement. The game features tire wear simulation, wing angle adjustment, transmission settings, engine damage/overheating mechanics, and damage tolerance that varies by difficulty level.

physics_values.tire_wear_system: Yes - player must pit to replace worn tires
physics_values.engine_heat_system: Yes - rapid downshifting causes overheating and over-revving

tier_notes: Tier 3: This is a racing game, not a platformer or action game with character movement mechanics. No jump physics, gravity, or character movement parameters exist. Documentation describes the game engine as 'smooth and fast' qualitatively but provides no quantitative physics values. All standard movement parameters are null as they are inapplicable to the racing genre.
